text: Hey, your MTN subscription for 1GB daily bundle is done! Enjoy browsing 😊
We are breaking up. I cannot do this anymore. Do not call me.
Dear customer, your MTN MoMo payment of UGX 5,000 for data bundle was successful. Balance: UGX 2,300.
Bro I deployed my app on Heroku finally!! It is live! check it out at myapp.herokuapp.com 🔥🔥
wait now it crashed again. deployment failed. something about slug size exceeded. I hate Heroku
guys did anyone see the lucky prize winner announcement? I won a 50k MTN airtime voucher!! 🎉🎉
that is probably a scam bro, do not click any link
your Mastercard for the scholarship was rejected again. the bank said insufficient funds. what do we do now?
Codemagic build passed! APK is ready for QA. Great job team 👏
Build failed again on Codemagic. The Flutter version mismatch is killing us. We need to fix the pubspec.yaml.
I have been feeling so down lately. you never have time for me. i think we should take a break 💔
Your MTN weekly subscription of UGX 3,500 has been renewed successfully. Valid for 7 days.
Transaction failed. Your Airtel Money payment of UGX 20,000 could not be processed. Please try again.
Railway deployment is up 🚀 the backend API is now live. We can start testing the endpoints.
Vercel front end is also deployed. But Railway crashed overnight. logs say memory exceeded.
Reminder: Assignment submission is due tomorrow at midnight. No extensions will be given.
I just signed up for the Udemy Python course using your referral link. Thanks so much for recommending it 😊
The card payment for your Coursera subscription was declined again. Sort this out before your access expires.
Your reservation for Jan 20-22 is confirmed. Looking forward to hosting you!
stop texting me. we are done. this is the last time i am saying it. goodbye.
CONGRATULATIONS!! You are our LUCKY WINNER of UGX 2,000,000! Click now to claim your prize before it expires!
I finally fixed the slug size issue on Heroku. Had to remove some unused packages. build is passing now!
codemagic build #55 failed. saying something about missing google-services.json. who removed it from git?
MTN: Your nightly bundle subscription has been activated. 500MB valid until midnight. Enjoy!
I just wanted to say I am sorry about what I said. I did not mean it. I still care about you.
Vercel deployment is live and stable. Great work. This is a professional grade deployment pipeline.
the udemy registration link is not working. it keeps failing. I have tried like 5 times 😩
today's study session is at 10am. we are covering NLP preprocessing. dont be late
Praise God the scholarship payment finally went through today! I prayed and it worked 🙏🙏
Life has been so empty since you left. I feel like everything is falling apart. I miss you.
